# nullcloud_loadbalancer (Resource)

Manages a NullCloud load balancer.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nullcloud_loadbalancer" "example" {
  name     = "my-lb"
  protocol = "https"
  port     = 443

  targets = [
    {
      type = "cluster"
      id   = nullcloud_cluster.example.id
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the load balancer.
- `port` (Number) Port the load balancer listens on (1-65535).
- `protocol` (String) Protocol for the load balancer. Must be tcp, http, or https.

### Optional

- `targets` (Attributes List) List of targets (cluster or vsi) to route traffic to. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--targets))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--targets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `targets`

Required:

- `id` (String) ID of the target resource.
- `type` (String) Target type. Must be cluster or vsi.
